zh.lifeSummary: 當Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes於1170年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾時，她的父親Jacques d'AVESNES20歲，母親Adeline de Guise15歲。她於大約1206年與Louis IV comte de Chiny結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1237年11月5日在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes于1170年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾时，她的父亲Jacques d'AVESNES20岁，母亲Adeline de Guise15岁。她于大约1206年与Louis IV comte de Chiny结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1237年11月5日在她的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾。

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes was born in 1170, in Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Jacques d'AVESNES, was 20 and her mother, Adeline de Guise, was 15. She married Louis IV comte de Chiny about 1206. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died on 5 November 1237, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes est née en 1170, à Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jacques d'AVESNES, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Guise, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Louis IV comte de Chiny environ 1206. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 novembre 1237, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes 1170 in Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jacques d'AVESNES 20 und ihre Mutter Adeline de Guise 15. Sie hat um 1206 Louis IV comte de Chiny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. November 1237 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes è nata il nel 1170 nel Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Jacques d'AVESNES, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Adeline de Guise, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Louis IV comte de Chiny circa 1206. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì il 5 novembre 1237, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnesが1170年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードエイベスネス-スル-ヘルペで生まれた時，父Jacques d'AVESNESは20歳，母Adeline de Guiseは15歳であった。約1206年にLouis IV comte de Chinyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1237年11月5日に故郷で67歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードエイベスネス-スル-ヘルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes(이)가 1170년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 에베스네스-수-헬프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jacques d'AVESNES(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeline de Guise(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1206년 Louis IV comte de Chiny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1237년 11월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 에베스네스-수-헬프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes nasceu em 1170, em Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jacques d'AVESNES, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Adeline de Guise, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis IV comte de Chiny aproximadamente 1206. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1237, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes родилась в 1170 г. в местности авеснес-сур-хелп, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Jacques d'AVESNES было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Guise, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis IV comte de Chiny около 1206 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла 5 ноября 1237 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности авеснес-сур-хелп, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes nació en 1170, en Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jacques d'AVESNES, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Adeline de Guise, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Louis IV comte de Chiny aproximadamente 1206. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1237, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
